---
title: "Landmarks of History 2. Middle Ages: from the Reign of Charlemagne to that of Charles V. By the author of “The Kings of England,” etc."
---

## Landmarks of History 2. Middle Ages: from the Reign of Charlemagne to that of Charles V. By the author of “The Kings of England,” etc.

**By Charlotte Mary Yonge**

**Published:** 1853
**Genre:** Non-fiction: history
**Format:** Book

**Publisher:** John and Charles Mozley, Paternoster Row, London; J.H. Parker, Oxford; and 337, Strand; London; Joseph Masters, 78, New Bond Street, London.

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
